title: Ebenidium
taxonomy: Ebenidium is a genus of air plant, specifically a type of tillandsia. The genus belongs to the family Bromeliaceae, which is a large family of tropical plants. Bromeliaceae is further classified under the order Poales, and then the subclass Commelinidae. This classification places Ebenidium within the monocots, a group of flowering plants with a single cotyledon in their seeds. Ebenidium's classification reflects its unique adaptations for air-dwelling and its evolutionary connections to other tropical plants.
